title: Ubiquiti UACC-G4-INS-Cover-Grey, Rubber cover for G4 Instant camera
description: The rubber case in grey color is intended for the Ubiquiti UniFi Protect G4 Instant camera. The case instantly transforms the aesthetics of your G4 Instant camera, so it blends seamlessly into the surrounding area as you envision it. The rubber cases are available in 3 shades of grey
